message:
fix(tty): update ControlFrameType references to TtyControlFrame enum

Removed ControlFrameType re-export from tty_audio.rs (the type was
renamed to TtyControlFrame in a previous commit). Updated all test
references from ControlFrameType::SessionClose to
TtyControlFrame::SessionClose. Cleaned up imports in tty_control_tests.rs
to use the new type path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
